title: phyllanthus calocarpus
intro: Phyllanthus calocarpus, also known as the 'yellow berry', is a type of flowering plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. Traditionally, the plant is used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus calocarpus are said to include the treatment of liver and kidney diseases, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus calocarpus include decoctions and infusions made from the leaves and roots of the plant, which are used to treat various ailments.
